purpose: Criteria skeleton for M49. This does not implement the milestone; it prevents queued coverage rows from being skipped or completed by checklist text only.

registryContract.ownedScope: info/help/settings/debug, PRINT/HTML/message/help/status text, and remaining feature rows

rules: No coverage artifact means no completed implementation claim.
Queued row counts are responsibility counts, not completed counts.
source-file-review is never completed until decomposed into concrete source units or explicitly excluded.
M49 is not a catch-all escape hatch; intake rows must record original owner candidate and reason for M49 ownership.
notes: M29 inbound view/text/session row must be implemented or explicitly excluded by the info/settings owner before M49 can close.
M49 is view/text/settings closer, not a general dumping ground. Intake rows must preserve source id, original owner candidate, reason for M49 ownership, and exclusion status.
M32 approved-excluded inbound responsibilities are blocked here until M49 implements, explicitly excludes, or redesigns them.

requiredEvidenceTemplate.sourceEvidence: Every referenced row keeps primary source evidence or is converted into approved exclusion with user approval.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.featureRuntime: Feature rows require route/action/view/handler success evidence before the owner milestone can close.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.definitionConsumption: Definition rows require runtime consumption through feature/view/calculation/save-init, or a blocker/approved exclusion.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.saveRoundtrip: Save roundtrip required only if this unit mutates save state.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.sessionLifecycle: No session/calculation rows in this unit.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.viewEvidence: If user-visible state is involved, the owner milestone must add view evidence or an explicit not-visible reason.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.pathCoverage: Success path is required. Failure/cancel/roundtrip are required when the row kind or feature flow can produce them.

units.requiredBehavior: info/help/settings/debug, PRINT/HTML/message/help/status text, and remaining feature rows
units.runtimeConsumerId: must be supplied by milestone coverage artifact before completion
units.blockerReason: Coverage artifact and runtime verification do not exist yet for this queued owner unit.
completionCriteria: Every queued row must become implemented-verified, approved-excluded, blocked, or scope-redesign-required.
Definitions/listings/display-only rows need runtime consumption evidence, not document-only status.
Feature rows need route/action/handler/calculation/view evidence as applicable.
Save/session rows need save-boundary or non-save/session-boundary evidence.
source-file-review rows must be decomposed before completion.

requiredEvidenceTemplate.featureRuntime: No feature rows in this unit.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.definitionConsumption: No definition rows in this unit.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.saveRoundtrip: Save roundtrip required only if this unit mutates save state.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.sessionLifecycle: No session/calculation rows in this unit.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.viewEvidence: If user-visible state is involved, the owner milestone must add view evidence or an explicit not-visible reason.
requiredEvidenceTemplate.pathCoverage: Success path is required. Failure/cancel/roundtrip are required when the row kind or feature flow can produce them.

units.requiredBehavior: info/help/settings/debug, PRINT/HTML/message/help/status text, and remaining feature rows
units.runtimeConsumerId: must be supplied by milestone coverage artifact before completion
units.blockerReason: File-level source review is not a completion unit. Decompose into source rows, approve exclusion, or assign explicit owner before completion.
completionCriteria: Every queued row must become implemented-verified, approved-excluded, blocked, or scope-redesign-required.
Definitions/listings/display-only rows need runtime consumption evidence, not document-only status.
Feature rows need route/action/handler/calculation/view evidence as applicable.
Save/session rows need save-boundary or non-save/session-boundary evidence.
source-file-review rows must be decomposed before completion.

units.blockerReason: Inbound responsibility from M29 approved exclusion. Outside M29 purchase-listing scope. This receiving milestone must implement it, approve exclusion, or redesign ownership before completion.

units.requiredBehavior: ZNAME.ERB is Korean particle/name formatting text behavior. M32 owns identity fields; M49 owns view/text formatting implementation.
units.blockerReason: Inbound responsibility from M32 approved exclusion. ZNAME.ERB is Korean particle/name formatting text behavior. M32 owns identity fields; M49 owns view/text formatting implementation. This receiving milestone must implement it, approve exclusion, or redesign ownership before completion.
